_note: Round 2 (one more generation back) for 8 round-1-added spouse-parents (batch e_1400_1750_3): Frederick III of Denmark, Luisa de Guzmán, Frances Aylesbury, Alfonso IV d'Este, Laura Martinozzi, Éléonore d'Olbreuse, John Frederick of Brandenburg-Ansbach, Eleonore Erdmuthe of Saxe-Eisenach. Existing batch person referenced by id string; new grandparents/great-grandparents and siblings are R2K_ nodes. All 8 fully documented on Wikipedia; no skips this batch. Half-siblings from a parent's other marriages are noted in the family 'note' but not added as nodes (kept to full-sibling unions, matching round-1 convention). 👑 = regnant sovereigns only.

families.note: Frederick III of Denmark -> father Christian IV (SPF_CHRISTIANIV, existing id, defined in the Anne of Denmark family) & mother Anne Catherine of Brandenburg; full siblings incl. Christian Prince-Elect (predeceased his father) and Ulrik (Prince-Bishop of Schwerin, murdered 1633); three others died in infancy/childhood. Half-siblings from Christian IV's later morganatic marriage to Kirsten Munk not included (different mother).
